title: Cest Magnifique
description: Set to take cabaret to new heights with a special performance on Brighton's i360! C’est Magnifique, winners of the 2025 Fringe Outgoing Touring Award and brought to you by Chocolate Box Theatre, is escapist heaven for any musical theatre fan. Step back to an imagined cabaret haunt in 1930s Paris or Berlin and join Cyril the emcee with Gaylord, Babette, Goldie, Bert and the indomitable Zelda as they perform ballads, torch songs, comedy numbers, musical theatre favourites and a pop of pop. C’est Magnifique appears in the Wunderbarn for four fabulous nights, plus a very special C’est Magnifique in the Sky aboard the iconic Brighton i360. Performed high above the seafront, it promises sparkle, sophistication and sky-high entertainment. Selling out to packed audiences with rave reviews, they don’t just can-can , they will, will; accompanied by live music and (very) high kicks!
